case_title: CLARA H KUTER VS. ELS EDUCATIONAL SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-11-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLARA H. KUTER IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT ELS EDUCATIONAL SERVICES INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY REBECCA SOTO, DISTRICT DIRECTOR AND DEAN WRIGHT, DISTRICT DIRECTOR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED. DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE.
